EmailTemplate.description: Response to request for documents to be re-sent.
EmailTemplate.name: Re-Sent Docs
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Requested Documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for your email.
As requested, I have re-sent your documents via email today for you. Please check your junk folder in case they have been sent there.
Please do not hesitate to get back in touch if you have any further queries.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
